channel.title: MacOS on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in MacOS on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: GitHub Copilot app available to all
item.description:
The GitHub Copilot app is now available on all Copilot plans. Users can sign in with a GitHub account and use it for agent-driven development from desktop on macOS, Windows, and Linux.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: GitHub Copilot app generally available
item.description:
GitHub Copilot app is now generally available on macOS, Windows, and Linux. It serves as a native desktop app for agent-driven development on GitHub.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Secure, Modern Access to Azure Files on macOS with MS Entra ID
item.description:
Azure Files now supports macOS access with Microsoft Entra ID authentication in public preview. This adds identity-based, secure access to file shares for cross-platform teams.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: github: Expanded technical preview availability for the GitHub Copilot app
item.description:
GitHub has expanded the technical preview of the Copilot app to all existing Copilot Pro, Pro+, Business, and Enterprise customers. The app is available for download on Windows, macOS, and Linux.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: security: ClickFix campaign uses fake macOS utilities lures to deliver infostealers
item.description:
Microsoft reports a ClickFix campaign targeting macOS users with fake utility fixes that prompt victims to run malicious Terminal commands. The malware is used to steal credentials, crypto wallets, and other sensitive data while bypassing traditional defenses.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog
